text: "An older man in a field throws a red ball. The white dog runs but returns with a bone."
original_texts: An older man with a beard and long coat stands in a grassy field, looking at a small white dog.
The white dog jumps up playfully in front of the man.
The man raises a red ball above his head, preparing to throw it.
The dog crouches down, ready to chase the ball.
The man throws the ball, and the dog runs off to fetch it.
The man watches the dog run away, shielding his eyes from the sun.
The man continues to look into the distance, waiting for the dog to return.
The dog returns holding a bone in its mouth, standing in front of the man.
